content_body:
Visit Blue Ridge's first fully dedicated wine shop! Looking for wine for everyday enjoyment? Need food pairing recommendations? Planning an order for a special event? Building your cellar collection to enjoy for years to come?

This team of passionate, friendly, knowledgeable wine specialists will gladly assist you in finding the perfect bottle, no matter the occasion! 34th Degree offers wine tasting, wine classes, and even a wine club to subscribe to.

  • Wine Tasting - Weekly Wine Tastings
  • Wine Classes - Join a class on how to imaginatively pair wines with different foods, explore different wine regions from around the globe, enjoy insights from guest speakers, and go on in-depth explorations of different wines based on monthly themes. 
  • Wine Club - Each month, they'll carefully curate a selection of wines based on variety, seasonality, staff selections, and more to crate an unforgettable assortment of bottles for you to enjoy. You can pick up your win in store, curbside, or join for the monthly Pick Up Party, where you can try different pairings, swap out elect bottles, or upgrade that month's assortment, all while enjoying the company of the 34th Degree community.
title: 34th Degree Wine Merchant
